description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a metallic body accented by orange and yellow components. The main barrel is cylindrical and reinforced, with a prominent muzzle and a visible attachment point for a canister or drum on the side. The shotgun is mounted on a mechanical tripod base with articulated legs, suggesting stability and possible automated or stationary use. Several exposed cables and mechanical joints are visible, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The surface is weathered, with visible wear and rust, indicating heavy use or outdoor deployment. The overall construction appears solid, with a mix of metal and synthetic materials.
description: A rugged, metallic shotgun with a cylindrical barrel, side canister, and mounted on a mechanical tripod base, featuring orange and yellow accents and visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular muzzle, reinforced barrel, and the canister attachment on the upper right, with the tripod legs partially visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical barrel, orange structural bands, and the full canister attachment, as well as the articulated tripod legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the canister and the symmetrical tripod legs, with less detail on the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the opposite side of the barrel, the canister, and the mechanical joints of the tripod, with orange accents visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with reinforced muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
